userStories.title: Emit run.complete on SIGTERM shutdown (BUG-017)
userStories.description:
When nax receives SIGTERM, the crash-recovery handler shuts down cleanly but never emits the final run.complete JSONL event. This means the run log has no aggregate cost/duration summary when nax is killed externally.

Find where SIGTERM is caught in src/execution/ and ensure a run.complete event is emitted before exit with: totalCost (sum of agent.complete costs), totalIterations, exitReason='sigterm', duration.

Acceptance criteria:
1. When nax is killed with SIGTERM mid-run, JSONL ends with run.complete event containing totalCost, totalIterations, exitReason='sigterm', duration
2. Existing tests pass
3. Add a unit test simulating SIGTERM that verifies run.complete is written
priorErrors: Attempt 1 failed with model tier: fast

userStories.title: Add storyId to all JSONL events (BUG-020)
userStories.description:
Many JSONL events have empty or missing storyId. Audit and fix these event emitters to include storyId when a story is active:
- src/pipeline/stages/verify.ts (verify info/debug events)
- src/pipeline/stages/execution.ts (execution events)
- src/tdd/orchestrator.ts (tdd session events)
- src/execution/pipeline-result-handler.ts (escalation events)

Acceptance criteria:
1. Events at stages agent.start, agent.complete, verify, tdd, execution, escalation include storyId in data when a story is active
2. Existing tests pass
3. Add tests verifying storyId presence on key events
priorErrors: Attempt 1 failed with model tier: fast
